title: Is possible to get the average from the column (Vertical)?
excerpt: Is possible to get the average from the column (Vertical)?

posts.author: judyguerrero (Judy)
posts.cookedHtml: Is possible to get the average from the column (Vertical)?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Yep! Just click on the ‘column summary’ at the bottom of the column you’re looking at and change the function to Average.
